Contract.title: Contract
Contract.description: A contract record with its lifecycle and contact information.

amount.description: The total amount of the contract.

startDate.description: The start date of the contract.

endDate.description: The end date of the contract.

contactPerson.description: The person in charge of the contract.

contactEmail.description: The email address of the person in charge.

ownerUid.description: The UID of the user who created the contract.

notified.description: Whether the notification email has been sent.

completed.description: Whether the tendering process is completed.

campus.description: The campus the contract belongs to.
